COUNTER COMPLEX CASE DESIGNATION FILED BY DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. HAVING FAILED TO MOVE TO VACATE, THE ARBITRATION JUDGMENT BECAME FINAL AND HAS RELITIGATING ISSUES THAT COULD HAVE BEEN RAISED AT THAT TIME EVEN WHEN SUCH ISSUES ARE RAISED IN A COLLATERAL ACTION UNDER THE HEADING OF BREACH OF CONTRACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Off Calendar May-13-2008 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: GINBINEH T. AYELE, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA, TEL. 749-1904;
ATTY. YVONNE M. PIERROU OF MARION'S INN, TEL.(510)451-6770, FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.

RULING: A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. HAVING FAILED TO MOVE TO VACATE, THE ARBITRATION JUDGMENT BECAME FINAL AND HAS RELITIGATING ISSUES THAT COULD HAVE BEEN RAISED AT THAT TIME EVEN WHEN SUCH ISSUES ARE RAISED IN A COLLATERAL ACTION UNDER THE HEADING OF BREACH OF CONTRACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/AL)
